ORDER ON DEFENDANT TAMARINE, LLC'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TAMARINE LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT-MOVING PARTY & FOR PLAINTIFF-OPPOSING PARTY. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING - 1.)OVERRULE DEMURRER 2ND & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. 2.)SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 3RD AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. 3.)GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE ATTORNEYS FEES AND GENERAL DAMAGES. 4.)GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PUNITIVE DAMAGES TO PLEAD FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY RE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
